offer: For restaurant managers processing 10-20 purchase orders/month, inefficient tracking causes stockouts. We provide a cloud-based inventory management system instead of manual inventory tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of stock levels leading to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing restaurant tools
try_it: Let users try real-time stock tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing inventory data
